content.en:
The gray-red river is getting smaller and smaller, and the cultivation and life level of many Ninefold Origin Ancestors and Avatar Levels are naturally getting higher and higher.

Ye Tian, in particular, has gained the most benefits.

Time passed slowly, and this long gray-red river was gradually running out of energy.

At this time, Ye Tian's life level had already reached 107, which was a huge transformation!

As his life level skyrocketed, his physical body became extremely powerful, and his strength greatly increased.

With his current strength, he was already infinitely close to the first rank of the Ninefold Ancestor, saving countless years of penance.

"The life level has been raised to 107, I only need to raise it again, and when I reach the 108 life level, I can use the Eternal Flint to impact the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

Of course, it was extremely difficult to raise the life level from 107 to 108, and many of the Ninefold Ancestors of the First Rank had not been able to impact the Ninefold Ancestors so far, and they were trapped at this step.

I think that the shadow stone of the Boulder tribe has obtained the eternal flint for countless years, and with the help of the entire Boulder tribe, it has not reached this step.

If this step had been so easy, the Eternal Flint would not have fallen into his hands.

Another period of time passed, and the gray-red long river energy was completely exhausted.

As a result, a ninefold ancestor and a transformation-level powerhouse came out of it.

At this time, those Supreme Ninefold Ancestors and Supreme Strengthening Matter-level powerhouses had already left here, and it was impossible for them to wait here all the time.

After all, there are so many treasures here, and they won't waste time staying here.

Whew!!

One by one, the Ninefold Origin Ancestor and the Transformation Level, also quickly fled, not daring to stay here.

Abrupt.

A big battle broke out somewhere between the Supreme Nine Ancestors and the Supreme Strengthening Matter Level, and Ye Tian and the others did not dare to approach, and quickly moved away from this area.

However, Ye Tian did not completely leave the core area, he still wanted to take a risk.

So, he sneaked in the other direction.

When he came to a certain place, he suddenly sensed a faint attraction.

This attraction attracted his copying talent, and this familiar feeling made Ye Tian realize that there must be a treasure somewhere ahead that could upgrade the copying talent.

"There's hope for a copy talent upgrade!"

Ye Tian was very excited, so he went very cautiously.

Along the way, he sensed a lot of terrifying creatures, and there were even creatures comparable to the level of the Xeon Ninefold Ancestor.

However, he did not intrude into the opponent's territory, and if he bypassed, he would not be attacked by the opponent.

In this way, he has not had an accident.

Of course, this is also his copying talent, which can detect the talent and breath strength of these creatures, so as to avoid them.

If it's another Ninefold Ancestor, I don't know how many times I've died.

"I'm getting close to that treasure!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

Soon, Ye Tian came to his destination.

At this time, he sensed a group of incomparably powerful creatures.

This is a race called the Purple Dragon Void Worm, there are about thousands of Purple Dragon Void Worms here, and the weakest Purple Dragon Void Worm has the strength of the Fifth Rank of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestor.

And that treasure was in the center of the Purple Dragon Void Worm's territory, and with his strength, it was an extravagant hope to sneak in, and once it was discovered, he would definitely die.

"The Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan has a strengthened substance-level existence, and there is more than one, my strength is far weaker than the other party, I will definitely be discovered by them!"

Ye Tian thought about it carefully, and it seemed that there was only one way.

That is, he copied a Purple Dragon Void Worm, and then infiltrated the Purple Dragon Void Worm's territory as a copy of the Purple Dragon Void Insect's body, so that he would have the opportunity to take that treasure.

Of course.

The premise is that he can find a lone Purple Dragon Void Worm and ensure that the other party does not return to the Purple Dragon Void Worm territory.

In this way, he copies the other party's body, and his identity will not be exposed!

But such an opportunity was hard to find, he waited for some days, and these purple dragon void insects did not leave.

And the number of Purple Dragon Void Worms is only thousands, once there is no suitable opportunity, just copy a Purple Dragon Void Worm, it will definitely be exposed.

Once exposed, the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan has vigilance, then he has no chance.

"If the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan breaks out into war, then there will be a chance!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Abrupt.

He thought of a solution, that is, he copied a purple dragon void worm, and then attacked the other races, causing a war between the two races.

In this way, he will have a chance to fish in troubled waters!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian copied a Purple Dragon Void Worm whose strength was comparable to the second rank of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and then went to find another powerful race that was not too far from here, the Black-Winged Ape Clan!

The Blackwing Ape Clan is smaller in number, but each individual is very strong.

Thereupon.

Ye Tian chose a weaker Black-Winged Ape Clan, which was about the same as the Fourth Tier of the Ninefold Ancestral Ancestor.

......

In a mountain range, a black-winged ape is waiting for a treasure to ripen.

Abrupt.

A purple dragon void worm appeared.

Seeing the Purple Dragon Void Insect, the Black-winged Ape didn't feel anything, after all, the distance between the two clans was not too far, and they often ran into each other.

However, they do not interfere with river water and rarely conflict with each other.

But suddenly, this purple dragon void worm attacked him.

"Not good!"

The black-winged ape shuddered and immediately called for help.

It's a pity that the difference in strength between the two sides is too great, and it simply has no chance to wait for assistance.

Bang!!!!

After a few moves, this black-winged ape was killed by Ye Tian.

Subsequently, Ye Tian annihilated the replica body, and the arriving black-winged ape couldn't find the murderer at all.

However, the Black-Winged Ape Clan still locked on to the fierce beast through its breath, and it was the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan who did it.

However, a war between the two clans is not so easy to happen.

Seeing this, Ye Tian began to plan a second attack.

This time, after Ye Tian killed a black-winged ape, he did not let the purple dragon void worm copy the body and escape, but waited to be caught by the black-winged ape on the spot.

Rumble!!!!

A black-winged ape with strength comparable to that of an enhanced substance appeared, and his aura was extremely terrifying, completely freezing the surrounding time and space.

Seeing that the other party was coming, Ye Tian let this replica body explode directly.

"Purple Dragon Void Worm, you are looking for !! death"

The black-winged ape, which was at the level of the enhancement, was extremely angry, and his voice roared into the surrounding space.

The next moment, it returned to the clan, preparing to attack the Purple Dragon Void Worm Clan.
